title: AMERICAN CROSSBOWS RAAAAAGHHHHHH
description: Replaces boring old crossbows with guns
body:
Instead of wielding that boring old little crossbow, how about you get ahold of a few guns? Interested in some _"concealed firearms"_ aren't you?



## Weapon Names

### Wooden Sword:
	"Classic Wooden Sword"
### Stone Sword:
	"Classic Stone Sword"
### Iron Sword:
	"Classic Iron Sword"
### Gold Sword:
	"Classic Gold Sword"
### Diamond Sword:
	"Classic Diamond Sword"
	"Black Knife"
	"Ruby Sword"
	"Emerald Sword"
### Netherite Sword:
	"Classic Netherite Sword"
	"Black Knife"
	"Golden Knife"
	"Obsidian Sword"
	"Crying Obsidian Sword"
	"Bedrock Sword"
	
	
	
### Crossbow:
	"Pistol"
	"Rifle"
	"Legacy Shotgun"
	"Laser Gun"
	"Super Soaker"
	"NSP", "Nerf Sniper Pistol"




## Want more guns?

_Suggest one right here:_ https://suggestgunsformyresourcepack.straw.page/


![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QiuEtFeG/images/c156061f53cbe37bd8d045f6de79cab780dc97b1.png)
